summary: Tested new client-side Excel parsing architecture for historical uploads. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI (HistoricalUpload and UploadManager pages) verified working correctly with all data-testid attributes present. The new POST /api/upload/client-batch endpoint correctly handles historical_sale and historical_purchase file types with proper column mapping and KG-to-grams weight conversion.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ _parse_raw_rows() function correctly applies column mapping for both sale and purchase types
✓ KG to grams conversion (* 1000) applied to all weight fields (net_wt, gr_wt, fine, dia_wt, stn_wt)
✓ Client-batch endpoint correctly accumulates records across multiple batches using batch_id
✓ is_final flag properly returns total count and completion message
✓ Frontend uses SheetJS (xlsx library) for client-side Excel parsing - no server-side OOM risk
✓ Progress bar shows real-time batch progress during upload
✓ BATCH_SIZE of 2000 rows is used consistently in frontend
✓ Old /api/transactions/upload/{file_type} endpoints still work (return 422 without file, not 404)
seed_data_creation: Test records created with batch_id prefix 'TEST_' for identification during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client-batch upload feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/upload/client-batch (new architecture), POST /api/transactions/upload/{file_type} (old endpoints still work). Historical data is stored in historical_transactions collection. Frontend HistoricalUpload page uses SheetJS to parse Excel client-side and sends 2000-row batches. The summary endpoint at GET /api/historical/summary shows uploaded data by year.

POST /api/upload/client-batch.sale_column_mapping: PASSED - Item Name, Type S/S_RETURN, Party Name, Gold Std., Tunch, Fine, Total, Date
POST /api/upload/client-batch.purchase_column_mapping: PASSED - Item Name, Type P/P_RETURN, Party Name, Net.Wt, Tunch, Wstg, Fine, Total, Rate
POST /api/upload/client-batch.multi_batch_accumulation: PASSED - 3 batches with same batch_id correctly accumulated 6 records

frontend.UploadManager_tabs: PASSED - Master Stock, Transactions, Branch Transfer, Physical Stock

production_evidence.historical_data_uploaded: 2025: 203,487 sale records (38,852.626 kg), 8,323 purchase records (39,094.84 kg)
production_evidence.client_side_parsing_working: SheetJS library imports and parses Excel in browser

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/upload/client-batch (empty rows + is_final) - 200 OK with totals
GET /api/historical/summary - 200 OK with years and summary
